title: Cozy Chicken Fajitas
description: A delicious Mexican dish made with marinated chicken, sautéed onions and bell peppers, served with warm flour tortillas.
instructions: Marinate the chicken in the chillilicious, cozy, and med for 30 minutes.
Heat the med in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender.
Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by slicing the cooked chicken and adding it to the tortillas, along with the sautéed onion and bell pepper.
